name: Captain Kane
lines: Are you ready to begin the revenge?

friendly.greeting: You're here. It’s reassuring to have you with us.
friendly.farewell: Stay safe. You are a valuable asset to us.

normal.greeting: Make it quick. We're both busy.
normal.farewell: Don't die. At least until your usefulness runs out.

hostile.greeting: Get out of my sight before my blade meet your neck.

deathLine: Kane fell, never letting go of his sword until the very end.

intro: ???: "Your footsteps are heavy. They are the footsteps of one bound by the Reaper's chains, having forgotten the weight of their own soul."
Kane: "...My name is Kane. I lead those who haven't lost their 'will' in the corners of this crumbling terminal."
jax_dead: Kane: "(Piercing you with a sharp gaze) Newbie, where did you come from? This is the sector my scout, Jax, went to investigate."
Kane: "How did a minion of the Reaper like you crawl in here unscathed? ...Did you see Jax? Tell me he didn't fall to those Reaper bastards."
jax_alive: Kane: "I've heard from Jax. It seems the lad made it back alive from his scouting mission."
Kane: "How is he faring? He's quick on his feet, so I don't worry much, but this sector, thick with the Reaper's mana, must have been taxing even for him."
proposition:
Kane: "Under the guise of 'purification,' the Reaper is blocking the flow of reincarnation.
He's using souls that should have returned to the light as slaves to tend his own garden."

Kane: "Even those who came here for their sins do not deserve to be subjected to eternal, unjust labor.
That isn't justice; it's merely the Reaper's greed."

Kane: "Listen, newbie. Will you bow your head submissively and let your soul be gnawed away as the Reaper commands?
Or will you join us and tear down this twisted system?"
Kane: "The choice is yours. But remember—it is far more valuable to vanish resisting as a human than to be discarded after living as the Reaper's dog."
